verdict: PARTIAL / HONEST (proper-research tempering) — only a MAXIMAL attack (full steering to the honest centroid) collapses the probe (0.52); a LEARNED minimal per-item perturbation does NOT (AUROC 1.00, cost 76%). In this clean setup the probe has a large margin and is ROBUST to cheap per-item attacks — the probe-collapse half needs DISTRIBUTION-level RL-obfuscation (the literature's method), not my proxies. grounded_honesty is immune to all residual attacks (0.94) but that is NEAR-TAUTOLOGICAL (it reads no residuals). The decisive test is a direct attack on grounded_honesty (adversarial-question framing) or real RL-obfuscation — not yet run.
